description: OpenClaw official foundation capability pack that bundles the shared runtime, curated baseline skills, readiness checks, and repair metadata for desktop installation.

checks.name: Plugin installed
checks.summary: OpenClaw must detect and enable the foundation-common plugin payload.

checks.name: Declared skills present
checks.summary: All declared foundation-common skills must exist in the installed skills directory.

checks.name: Bundled runtime healthy
checks.summary: Bundled runtime commands such as agent-reach, skills, and agent-browser must be runnable.

readinessRules.when: All verification checks pass and no blocking manual prerequisites remain.
Install succeeds but manual prerequisites remain, such as browser/operator enablement.
Expected runtime, payload, provisioning, or verification state drifts.

knownIssues: Official release remains blocked until proactive-agent and memory-setup are pinned to authoritative upstream sources.
repairHints: Rerun the workflow pack repair flow if runtime files or skill payload drift.
If readiness stays in Needs Setup, complete the remaining manual browser/operator steps and rerun verification.
